description: Balanced DRR value across hazard exposure vulnerability capacity justice and maladaptation risk.
Prioritizes lowering hazard intensity or direct physical threat.
Prioritizes keeping people assets ecosystems and services out of harm's way.
Prioritizes reducing susceptibility to disaster harm through housing health income ecosystems and access.
Prioritizes warning response recovery coordination and continuity capacity.
Prioritizes protection for highly exposed and historically underserved communities.
Prioritizes penalties for interventions that shift risk deepen future vulnerability or create false security.
